title: mimulus tenellus var. platyphyllus
intro: Mimulus tenellus var. platyphyllus is a variety of the Monkey Flower plant, a flowering plant native to North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being an anti-inflammatory and an antiseptic, helping to soothe and calm the skin and reduce redness and irritation. The health benefits of Mimulus tenellus var. platyphyllus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to promote overall well-being.
